headline: Pierce Charles
body: Manchester City are close to re-signing 20-year-old goalkeeper Pierce Charles from Sheffield Wednesday. Should a deal be completed, Charles is likely to be sent out on loan.🧤 🤝 alex_crook
raw_text:
Manchester City are close to re-signing 20-year-old goalkeeper Pierce Charles from Sheffield Wednesday. 

Should a deal be completed, Charles is likely to be sent out on loan.🧤

🤝 @alex_crook
text:
🚨🔵 Pierce Charles has agreed to return to Manchester City, deal in place with Sheffield Wednesday with formalities being sorted.

#MCFC to decide next about Charles staying or leaving on loan.
draft_caption:
✅ LOAN- PIERCE CHARLES CONFIRMED LOAN MOVE TO MANCHESTER CITY.
💰 PRICE — TBD
📝 CONTRACT — TBD

#MCFC #TransferNews #PremierLeague #FPL
